content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(2, 5, 0), (1, 7, 1), (1, 2, 2), (1, 4, 2), (4, 6, 2), (6, 8, 3), (1, 3, 4), (0, 9, 5), (3, 6, 7), (7, 9, 7), (5, 6, 8), (0, 6, 9), (2, 6, 15), (8, 9, 15), (6, 7, 17), (0, 8, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 8 exactly at time 19.

First, we will scan each edge and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (2, 5, 0) has node 2 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (1, 7, 1) has node 1 and time 1. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (1, 2, 2) has node 1 and time 2. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (1, 4, 2) has node 1 and time 2. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (4, 6, 2) has node 4 and time 2. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (6, 8, 3) has node 6 and time 3. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 3, 4) has node 1 and time 4. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (0, 9, 5) has node 0 and time 5. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 6, 7) has node 3 and time 7. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (7, 9, 7) has node 7 and time 7. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (5, 6, 8) has node 5 and time 8. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (0, 6, 9) has node 0 and time 9. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (2, 6, 15) has node 2 and time 15. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (8, 9, 15) has node 8 and time 15. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (6, 7, 17) has node 6 and time 17. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 8, 19) has node 0 and time 19. -> Add node 8.

Now we have collected all the nodes that are linked with node 8 at time 19.

Answer: [8]
